title: Zoo Field Trip (Before the High Schoolers Get the Better Animals)

sentences.en: Our whole class went to the city zoo today for a science field trip about animal habitats.
sentences.zh: 我們全班今天去市立動物園做自然課的校外教學，主題是動物的棲息地。

sentences.en: The first animal we saw was a huge elephant, calmly eating leaves like it had absolutely nowhere else to be.
sentences.zh: 我們看到的第一種動物是一頭巨大的大象，很淡定地吃著樹葉，好像完全沒有別的地方要去一樣。

sentences.en: Bernice screamed a little when a monkey jumped right onto the fence near us and stared straight at her lunch bag.
sentences.zh: 當一隻猴子跳到我們旁邊的圍欄上，直直盯著她的午餐袋看的時候，Bernice 小小尖叫了一下。

sentences.en: The lion was sleeping in the shade the whole time, which our teacher said is completely normal behavior during the day.
sentences.zh: 獅子全程都躺在陰影裡睡覺，我們老師說這在白天是完全正常的行為。

sentences.en: The tiger, on the other hand, kept walking back and forth along the fence, and it honestly looked a little bored.
sentences.zh: 反觀老虎，一直沿著圍欄來回走動，老實說看起來有點無聊。

sentences.en: William's school visited the zoo on a different day, and he said his favorite part was the rabbit petting area.
sentences.zh: William 的學校是另外一天去動物園，他說他最喜歡的是可以摸兔子的地方。

sentences.en: He also told me a bear at his zoo stood up on two legs to reach some fruit, which he thought was the coolest thing ever.
sentences.zh: 他還跟我說他那邊的動物園有一隻熊為了搆到水果用兩隻腳站了起來，他覺得那是有史以來最酷的事。

sentences.en: In the reptile section, we saw a long green snake sleeping in a warm glass box, not moving at all for the whole visit.
sentences.zh: 在爬蟲類展區，我們看到一條長長的綠蛇睡在一個溫暖的玻璃箱裡，整趟參觀都沒有動一下。

sentences.en: Bernice refused to go near the snake enclosure, saying even a sleeping snake gives her a strange feeling in her stomach.
sentences.zh: Bernice 拒絕靠近蛇的展區，說就算蛇在睡覺，也會讓她的胃有一種怪怪的感覺。

sentences.en: In the small animal house, there was a tiny mouse running through a maze, and a small group of sheep resting outside near the fence.
sentences.zh: 在小動物館裡，有一隻小老鼠在迷宮裡跑，外面圍欄附近還有一小群羊在休息。

sentences.en: The zoo also had a special insect area, with real ants building a tunnel, bees near a small flower garden, and colorful butterflies flying freely inside a large net room.
sentences.zh: 動物園裡還有一個特別的昆蟲區，有真正的螞蟻在打隧道、蜜蜂在一小片花園附近，還有色彩繽紛的蝴蝶在一間大網室裡自由飛翔。

sentences.en: William was fascinated by a green frog sitting perfectly still on a rock in a small pond, and he tried to imitate its face for the rest of the day.
sentences.zh: William 對一隻安靜坐在池塘石頭上的青蛙非常著迷，接下來一整天他都在模仿牠的表情。

sentences.en: Our teacher explained that every single insect and small animal in that section plays an important part in nature, even if it looks small or plain.
sentences.zh: 老師解釋說，那個區域裡的每一種昆蟲跟小動物，就算看起來又小又不起眼，在自然界裡都扮演著重要的角色。

sentences.en: By the end of the trip, my worksheet had notes about ten different animals, which Mr. Pan said was excellent for one visit.
sentences.zh: 校外教學結束時，我的學習單上寫了十種不同動物的筆記，潘老師說這對一次參觀來說已經很棒了。

sentences.en: William's worksheet, however, mostly had drawings of the bear standing up like a robot, with almost no actual notes.
sentences.zh: 不過 William 的學習單大部分是那隻站起來像機器人的熊的塗鴉，幾乎沒寫什麼真正的筆記。

sentences.en: That evening, William tried to convince Perry to stand up on two legs like the bear, and Perry looked at him like he had lost his mind completely.
sentences.zh: 那天晚上，William 想說服 Perry 也學那隻熊用兩隻腳站起來，Perry 看他的表情就像覺得他完全瘋了一樣。

quiz.question: Why does the tiger look a little bored, according to Coco?
options: It keeps walking back and forth along the fence.
It is sleeping the whole time.

quiz.question: What does William say a bear did at his zoo?
options: Stood up on two legs to reach some fruit.

quiz.question: Why does Bernice refuse to go near the snake enclosure?
options: Even a sleeping snake gives her a strange feeling.
She is afraid of the glass breaking.
